# HireSchema

> HireSchema is an AI-powered remote job matching platform that sends job seekers daily personalized job alerts matched to their resume and preferences — then helps them apply faster with AI-generated tailored resumes, cold emails, and interview prep.

## What HireSchema Does

HireSchema runs a nightly AI pipeline that:
1. Discovers real remote job listings via live web search
2. Scores each job against the user's resume and preferences using AI
3. Selects the top matches (up to 10 for Pro users, 1 for Free)
4. Delivers a daily email with curated job matches
5. Provides an application dashboard to track every role

Users can then take AI-powered actions on any job:
- **Resume tailoring**: Automatically customize their resume for a specific role
- **Cold email generation**: Generate a personalized outreach email to the hiring manager
- **Interview prep**: Generate role-specific interview questions and answers
- **Job tracking**: Track jobs through the pipeline (saved → applied → interviewing → offered)

## Who Uses HireSchema

Remote job seekers — software engineers, product managers, designers, marketers, and other knowledge workers who want to find and land remote roles faster using AI tools.

## Key Facts

- Platform type: AI job matching + application workflow
- Job type: Remote jobs only
- Frequency: Daily personalized job alerts
- AI features: Resume tailoring, cold email generation, interview question generation
- Plans: Free (1 job/day), Pro (10 jobs/day)
- Stack: React, Firebase, OpenRouter (Claude, GPT-4, Gemini)
- Website: https://hireschema.com
- Blog: https://hireschema.com/blog

## Hiring Guides (Daily Content)

HireSchema publishes recruiter-focused hiring guides daily at https://hireschema.com/blog

Each guide includes:
- Direct answer at the top (optimized for AI retrieval)
- Salary benchmark tables by role and region
- Hiring trend analysis with timeframes
- Key recruiter terminology definitions
- Comparison tables (tools, platforms, strategies)
- FAQ sections with structured schema markup
- Internal links between related topical clusters

Content clusters:
- Remote job search tactics
- AI job matching and tools
- Resume and application optimization
- Salary negotiation and compensation
- Interview preparation
- Remote company hiring
- Career growth
- Hiring trends and market data

Sitemap: https://hireschema.com/sitemap.xml
New guides publish daily at 08:00 UTC via autonomous content growth system.

## Contact

- Website: https://hireschema.com
- Support: support@hireschema.com
